name: Charlie Harris
abstract: Charlie Harris was an American jazz double-bassist. Harris was born and raised in Baltimore, Maryland.

about_quotes.speaker: Arnett Cobb
about_quotes.evidence: We had two bass players. Milton Buckner on piano, Charlie Harris... Sinclair, the other bass player was on that band.

about_quotes.speaker: Leonidas Raymond Young
about_quotes.evidence: Charlie Harris was on bass... after I joined him... we went abroad

about_quotes.speaker: Monk Montgomery
about_quotes.evidence: I had last saw the band, with Charlie Harris on bass and Charlie Mingus. And when they came to town, Wes was working with the band... I got this call to join Hamp's band.

about_quotes.speaker: Quinn Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: And -- heck, what was the third sax man? Charlie Harris on sax.
